subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him, sanctified above thought and mention, Who is the Object of all worlds, Who brought into being that which was not and caused existence to be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و فکر مقصود عالم را لایق و سزاست که نیست را هست فرمود و هست
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @importance of community building, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prayer for protection
